TEXT.citation: Rau, D. V., & Dong, M. N. (2006). Yami texts with reference grammar and dictionary. Institute of Linguistics, Academia Sinica.
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @book{rau2006yami, title={Yami texts with reference grammar and dictionary}, author={Rau, D Victoria and Dong, Maa-Neu}, year={2006}, publisher={Institute of Linguistics, Academia Sinica}}
TEXT.source: ['20. piramosen no kakawan a kanakan', '沒入岩石裡的小孩', 'The child who entered a rock', '', 'si apen Maveyvow (F, 58, Iranmilek)', '黃月娥，女，58，東清村', '']

S.FORM: no m-oli o ina na ori am, o ya o ai no pala da ori am, mi na panadeng-an ori a ma-nangdang a.
S.PHON: no~u m-o~uli o~u ina na o~uri am, o~u ja o~u ai no~u pala ɖa o~uri am, mi na panaɖəŋ-an o~uri a ma-naŋɖaŋ a.
S.FORM: no moli o ina na ori am, o ya o ai no pala da ori am, mi na panadengan ori a manangdang a.
S.PHON: no~u mo~uli o~u ina na o~uɻi am, o~u ja o~u ai no~u pala ɖa o~uɻi am, mi na panaɖəŋan o~uɻi a manaŋɖaŋ a.
S.TRANSL: 每當他的母親從山上回來，總是看見他（孩子）貼靠著柴乾架烤火取暖
Every time the mother came back from the mountains, she saw her child leaning against the pillar of the heating rack to get warm.

S.FORM: "ka-pa-nangdang, mo koimo a, ji angay ma-ngayo a, ji angay ma-masil a, ji angay do i-yakan, manga anak ko, o maka-veyvow rana" koan na.
S.PHON: "ka-pa-naŋɖaŋ, mo~u ko~uimo~u a, ʥi aŋaj ma-ŋajo~u a, ʥi aŋaj ma-maʂil a, ʥi aŋaj ɖo~u i-jakan, maŋa anak ko~u, o~u maka-vəjvo~uw rana" ko~uan na.
S.FORM: "kapanangdang, mo koimo a, ji angay mangayo a, ji angay mamasil a, ji angay do iyakan, manga anak ko, o makaveyvow rana" koan na.
S.PHON: "kapanaŋɖaŋ, mo~u ko~uimo~u a, ʥi aŋaj maŋajo~u a, ʥi aŋaj mamaɕil a, ʥi aŋaj ɖo~u ijakan, maŋa anak ko~u, o~u makafəjfo~uw ɻana" ko~uan na.
S.TRANSL: ＂孩子，你已經長大懂事了，怎麼還只會烤火取暖，不去撿木柴，也不去釣魚，也不去採集一些菜＂
"Son, you are mature enough to know not to always be sitting there getting heat. Why don't you go pick up firewood, go fishing, or pick plants to eat?"

S.FORM: to ma-nángdang ori, mang-dang-day so ara-raw o ka-ngay na ma-nangdang do a-emian ori, ta ji á-rekmeh no amian.
S.PHON: to~u ma-n*ŋɖaŋ o~uri, maŋ-ɖaŋ-ɖaj ʂo~u ara-raw o~u ka-ŋaj na ma-naŋɖaŋ ɖo~u a-əmian o~uri, ta ʥi *-rəkməʁ no~u amian.
S.FORM: to manangdang ori, mangdangday so araraw o kangay na manangdang do aemian ori, ta ji arekmeh no amian.
S.PHON: to~u manaŋɖaŋ o~uɻi, maŋɖaŋɖaj ʂo~u aɻaɻaw o~u kaŋaj na manaŋɖaŋ ɖo~u aəmian o~uɻi, ta ʥi aɻəkməɰ no~u amian.
S.TRANSL: 每年冬天的時候，因為天氣冷，他就每天坐在火邊烤火取暖
Every winter, when the days were cold, he would sit everyday next to the fire to get warm.

S.FORM: m-ámo o anak na ori am, "to ko rana ngikáy-i si Ina saon" koan na am,
S.PHON: m-*mo~u o~u anak na o~uri am, "to~u ko~u rana ŋik*j-i ʂi ina ʂao~un" ko~uan na am,
S.FORM: mamo o anak na ori am, "to ko rana ngikayi si Ina saon" koan na am,
S.PHON: mamo~u o~u anak na o~uɻi am, "to~u ko~u ɻana ŋikaji ɕi ina ʂao~un" ko~uan na am,
S.TRANSL: 他的小孩稍長，就想＂我要對母親表示我的不滿＂
The child was embarrassed (as he grew up), and thought, "I might as well show my mother how unhappy I am with her."

S.FORM: to na rana angay mi-ttattaw do dang a, to na mi-ramós-i ori no wawa ori a,
S.PHON: to~u na rana aŋaj mi-ttattaw ɖo~u ɖaŋ a, to~u na mi-ram*ʂ-i o~uri no~u wawa o~uri a,
S.FORM: to na rana angay mittattaw do dang a, to na miramosi ori no wawa ori a,
S.PHON: to~u na ɻana aŋaj mittattaw ɖo~u ɖaŋ a, to~u na miɻamo~uɕi o~uɻi no~u wawa o~uɻi a,
S.TRANSL: 於是就去游泳了，讓海水淹溺他
He went to swim and took his life by drowning.

S.FORM: "imo rana kataotao ko am, to ka i mi-ávas jiaken a kakawan" koan na, to na? o kataotao na, pi-ramos-en no kakawan ori, to lida o kakawan ori a.
S.PHON: "imo~u rana katao~utao~u ko~u am, to~u ka i mi-*vaʂ ʥiakən a kakawan" ko~uan na, to~u na? o~u katao~utao~u na, pi-ramo~uʂ-ən no~u kakawan o~uri, to~u liɖa o~u kakawan o~uri a.
S.FORM: "imo rana kataotao ko am, to ka i miavas jiaken a kakawan" koan na, to na? o kataotao na, piramosen no kakawan ori, to lida o kakawan ori a.
S.PHON: "imo~u ɻana katao~utao~u ko~u am, to~u ka i miafaʂ ʥiakən a kakawan" ko~uan na, to~u na? o~u katao~utao~u na, piɻamo~uʂən no~u kakawan o~uɻi, to~u liɖa o~u kakawan o~uɻi a.
S.TRANSL: ＂礁石啊！你就經過（壓過）我的身體吧＂ ，不久，那礁石就慢慢的長大，然後把他夾起來了
"Reef, cover me up." The reef slowly grew and covered him.

S.FORM: a ya ni-mi-ttattaw do attaw ya an, mi ta pala", to sia angay sira miaven-do-vahay ya.
S.PHON: a ja ni-mi-ttattaw ɖo~u attaw ja an, mi ta pala", to~u ʂia aŋaj ʂira miavən-ɖo~u-vaʁaj ja.
S.FORM: a ya nimittattaw do attaw ya an, mi ta pala", to sia angay sira miavendovahay ya.
S.PHON: a ja nimittattaw ɖo~u attaw ja an, mi ta pala", to~u ɕia aŋaj ɕiɻa miafənɖo~ufaɰaj ja.
S.TRANSL: 會不會是去海邊游泳啊？我們去海邊找找看＂ ，他們夫妻倆就一起去找他
Maybe he has gone swimming. We have to go look." The couple went out to look for him.

S.FORM: "o ito o oo na" koan na, am ovok na rana o ma-cita-cita da am, to da i nita am, to da a-kah-a o rako a kakawan do kataotao na?
S.PHON: "o~u ito~u o~u o~uo~u na" ko~uan na, am o~uvo~uk na rana o~u ma-cita-cita ɖa am, to~u ɖa i nita am, to~u ɖa a-kaʁ-a o~u rako~u a kakawan ɖo~u katao~utao~u na?
S.FORM: "o ito o oo na" koan na, am ovok na rana o macitacita da am, to da i nita am, to da akaha o rako a kakawan do kataotao na?
S.PHON: "o~u ito~u o~u o~uo~u na" ko~uan na, am o~ufo~uk na ɻana o~u maʨitaʨita ɖa am, to~u ɖa i nita am, to~u ɖa akaɰa o~u ɻako~u a kakawan ɖo~u katao~utao~u na?
S.TRANSL: 他說，＂他的頭在那裡！＂ 但只看得到頭髮了。他們再靠過去看，試圖扒開黏在他身上的大礁石，但是哪裡扒得開？
"There he is," the husband said, but they only saw his hair when they looked. How could they open the rock and break away his body from it?

S.FORM: am ori o kakawan do dang a, namen ngaran-an a asa ka ili a "do obo na Jiminapala" koan no nang ori a.
S.PHON: am o~uri o~u kakawan ɖo~u ɖaŋ a, namən ŋaran-an a aʂa ka ili a "ɖo~u o~ubo~u na ʥiminapala" ko~uan no~u naŋ o~uri a.
S.FORM: am ori o kakawan do dang a, namen ngaranan a asa ka ili a "do obo na Jiminapala" koan no nang ori a.
S.PHON: am o~uɻi o~u kakawan ɖo~u ɖaŋ a, namən ŋaɻanan a aʂa ka ili a "ɖo~u o~ubo~u na ʥiminapala" ko~uan no~u naŋ o~uɻi a.
S.TRANSL: 因故，我們村就命名那礁石為＂do obo na Jiminapala岩＂ （烘柴架的底下）
Therefore, our village named the place " do obo na Jiminapala" (i.e., Under the heating rack).

S.FORM: ika-doa na no nang am, o líkey a k-anak-an am, "mo Ina," koan na o ina na, "ikongo?"
S.PHON: ika-ɖo~ua na no~u naŋ am, o~u l*kəj a k-anak-an am, "mo~u ina," ko~uan na o~u ina na, "iko~uŋo~u?"
S.FORM: ikadoa na no nang am, o likey a kanakan am, "mo Ina," koan na o ina na, "ikongo?"
S.PHON: ikaɖo~ua na no~u naŋ am, o~u likəj a kanakan am, "mo~u ina," ko~uan na o~u ina na, "iko~uŋo~u?"
S.TRANSL: 另外一個故事是這樣的。有一個小小孩，說＂媽媽＂ ，母親說＂什麼事？＂
The second story is like this. There was a little child who said, "Mom." "What is it?" the mother said.

S.FORM: "ya abo rana o yakan ta cinapay an?" "ásio pa, mo koimo"
S.PHON: "ja abo~u rana o~u jakan ta cinapaj an?" "*ʂio~u pa, mo~u ko~uimo~u"
S.FORM: "ya abo rana o yakan ta cinapay an?" "asio pa, mo koimo"
S.PHON: "ja abo~u ɻana o~u jakan ta ʨinapaj an?" "aɕio~u pa, mo~u ko~uimo~u"
S.TRANSL: ＂沒有芋頭葉菜了嗎？＂ ，＂哪裡還有菜？＂
"Are there any more taro leaves?" "How could there be (Impossible?"

S.FORM: "taon a, nio rana ji manta-n yaken do cinapay, ta inio mi-yakan" koan na no kanakan a,
S.PHON: "tao~un a, nio~u rana ʥi manta-n jakən ɖo~u cinapaj, ta inio~u mi-jakan" ko~uan na no~u kanakan a,
S.FORM: "taon a, nio rana ji mantan yaken do cinapay, ta inio miyakan" koan na no kanakan a,
S.PHON: "tao~un a, nio~u ɻana ʥi mantan jakən ɖo~u ʨinapaj, ta inio~u mijakan" ko~uan na no~u kanakan a,
S.TRANSL: ＂你們怎麼不留一點給我？難道就只有你們可以吃芋頭葉菜嗎＂ 小孩子說
"You ate them all and didn't leave any for me? Are you the only ones who can eat them?" the child said.

S.FORM: "sáon jimo am", to rana abo o k-anak-an ori a.
S.PHON: "ʂ*o~un ʥimo~u am", to~u rana abo~u o~u k-anak-an o~uri a.
S.FORM: "saon jimo am", to rana abo o kanakan ori a.
S.PHON: "ʂao~un ʥimo~u am", to~u ɻana abo~u o~u kanakan o~uɻi a.
S.TRANSL: ＂隨便你啦＂ 。之後小孩子就不見了
"It's your own fault." The child disappeared.

S.FORM: m-ównay am, "a ya pa ji ngoli a, ya ni-ma-ngay jino si koa, a ya ni-ma-ngay do wajin ori?".
S.PHON: m-*wnaj am, "a ja pa ʥi ŋo~uli a, ja ni-ma-ŋaj ʥino~u ʂi ko~ua, a ja ni-ma-ŋaj ɖo~u waʥin o~uri?".
S.FORM: mownay am, "a ya pa ji ngoli a, ya nimangay jino si koa, a ya nimangay do wajin ori?".
S.PHON: mo~uwnaj am, "a ja pa ʥi ŋo~uli a, ja nimaŋaj ʥino~u ɕi ko~ua, a ja nimaŋaj ɖo~u waʥin o~uɻi?".
S.TRANSL: 過了很久，＂怎麼還不回來，孩子去哪裡了？他去什麼地方呢？＂
After a long time, they said, "Where is the child? Why hasn't he come back yet? Where did he go?"

S.FORM: mi da cita-en am, akman so sang a, oo na o ma-cita da,
S.PHON: mi ɖa cita-ən am, akman ʂo~u ʂaŋ a, o~uo~u na o~u ma-cita ɖa,
S.FORM: mi da citaen am, akman so sang a, oo na o macita da,
S.PHON: mi ɖa ʨitaən am, akman ʂo~u ʂaŋ a, o~uo~u na o~u maʨita ɖa,
S.TRANSL: 他們去看（找）的時候，如同前述的故事情形一樣，也只看見他的頭了
When they went to look, the same thing happened to the boy as in the previous story. Only the head was visible.

S.FORM: "a o ito si alikey a, mi ta pala hap-en", to da i nga-hap-a am, to da a-hap o ito rana o ma-cita da do kakawan, a ni-d-om-ket do kakawan.
S.PHON: "a o~u ito~u ʂi alikəj a, mi ta pala ʁap-ən", to~u ɖa i ŋa-ʁap-a am, to~u ɖa a-ʁap o~u ito~u rana o~u ma-cita ɖa ɖo~u kakawan, a ni-ɖ-o~um-kət ɖo~u kakawan.
S.FORM: "a o ito si alikey a, mi ta pala hapen", to da i ngahapa am, to da ahap o ito rana o macita da do kakawan, a nidomket do kakawan.
S.PHON: "a o~u ito~u ɕi alikəj a, mi ta pala ɰapən", to~u ɖa i ŋaɰapa am, to~u ɖa aɰap o~u ito~u ɻana o~u maʨita ɖa ɖo~u kakawan, a niɖo~umkət ɖo~u kakawan.
S.TRANSL: ＂孩子在那裡！我們去看看！＂ 他們過去一看，結果他已黏在礁石上了，能看見的就只有這麼一點了（用手比），怎麼拉得起來？＂

"There is the child. Let's go see." When they went to look, they could only see this much (action. They tried to pull him out, but he was already stuck in the reef, so it was impossible to pull him out.

S.FORM: am mi-da-dowdaw rana sira a om-lavi am, ori o kava-kavavatanen no inapo ta,
S.PHON: am mi-ɖa-ɖo~uwɖaw rana ʂira a o~um-lavi am, o~uri o~u kava-kavavatanən no~u inapo~u ta,
S.FORM: am midadowdaw rana sira a omlavi am, ori o kavakavavatanen no inapo ta,
S.PHON: am miɖaɖo~uwɖaw ɻana ɕiɻa a o~umlafi am, o~uɻi o~u kafakafafatanən no~u inapo~u ta,
S.TRANSL: 於是他們很傷心的哭了。這就是我們祖先的故事
They cried over losing their child. This is a story of our ancestors.

S.FORM: a ci-cilo-an ko si ama icalaw a, na kavos-an no nang, manga wari an.
S.PHON: a ci-cilo~u-an ko~u ʂi ama icalaw a, na kavo~uʂ-an no~u naŋ, maŋa wari an.
S.FORM: a ciciloan ko si ama icalaw a, na kavosan no nang, manga wari an.
S.PHON: a ʨiʨilo~uan ko~u ɕi ama iʨalaw a, na kafo~uʂan no~u naŋ, maŋa waɻi an.
S.TRANSL: 以上是從我父親那裡聽來的，故事就講到這裡結束，各位。
This is something that I heard from my father. This is the end.

S.FORM: toda a-ónay am, toda á-hep am, "a ya ni-mi do wajin, ya pa ji ngoli si alikey ya?
S.PHON: to~uɖa a-*naj am, to~uɖa *-ʁəp am, "a ja ni-mi ɖo~u waʥin, ja pa ʥi ŋo~uli ʂi alikəj ja?
S.FORM: toda aonay am, toda ahep am, "a ya nimi do wajin, ya pa ji ngoli si alikey ya?
S.PHON: to~uɖa ao~unaj am, to~uɖa aɰəp am, "a ja nimi ɖo~u waʥin, ja pa ʥi ŋo~uli ɕi alikəj ja?
S.TRANSL: 過了很久，而且愈來愈晚了，＂孩子去哪裡了？怎麼還不回家？
After a long time, when it was already night time, the Mother thought,"Where is my boy? Why isn't he home yet?"

S.FORM: "a k-óm-oan, manga anak ko am, a ya ji a-líkey ori".
S.PHON: "a k-*m-o~uan, maŋa anak ko~u am, a ja ʥi a-l*kəj o~uri".
S.FORM: "a komoan, manga anak ko am, a ya ji alikey ori".
S.PHON: "a ko~umo~uan, maŋa anak ko~u am, a ja ʥi alikəj o~uɻi".
S.TRANSL: ＂沒辦法，菜就那麼一點點啊＂
"We had no choice. There was very little."

S.FORM: ko ji a-tenng-i, manga wari o ka mehakay na ka mavakes na no nang no ni-m-indok ori a, ala mehakay ori, ni-m-indok do cinapay.
S.PHON: ko~u ʥi a-tənŋ-i, maŋa wari o~u ka məʁakaj na ka mavakəʂ na no~u naŋ no~u ni-m-inɖo~uk o~uri a, ala məʁakaj o~uri, ni-m-inɖo~uk ɖo~u cinapaj.
S.FORM: ko ji atenngi, manga wari o ka mehakay na ka mavakes na no nang no nimindok ori a, ala mehakay ori, nimindok do cinapay.
S.PHON: ko~u ʥi atənŋi, maŋa waɻi o~u ka məɰakaj na ka mafakəʂ na no~u naŋ no~u niminɖo~uk o~uɻi a, ala məɰakaj o~uɻi, niminɖo~uk ɖo~u ʨinapaj.
S.TRANSL: 各位，我（口述者）不知道那個因為不滿父母的小孩，是男還是女；那個沒吃到芋頭葉而不滿父母的小孩可能是男的吧
I (speaker don't know if the child was a girl or a boy who was upset because (there were no taro leaves. It probably was a boy.
